name: Aberdeen PITAS (Personal Information Technology Awareness Service) 2002 Agreement Template
description: Contract template (with <NAME><COMPANY> placeholders) for Aberdeen's Personal Information Technology Awareness Service (PITAS) 2002 program at $2,500/year. Deliverables: Supplier Snapshot on Aberdeen website, objective press quotes, analyst reference for press/investors, and bi-annual one-hour briefings. Principal analysts: Peter Kastner, Ethan Cohen, Isaac Ro. Includes renewal, reprint fees ($1/reprint), and legal liability provisions.
